ops.text:
Pre-registered protocol (stage 1/3, mechanical extraction, no LLM calls):

GOAL: Sweep the mirror corpus (--root /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/mirrors/yasyf) and every pool account (/Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-*/) with the cc-transcript CLI (13.x) to extract every AskUserQuestion tool_use with a subsequent user answer.

FIELDS per decision: question, header, options (labels in order), multiSelect, picked option(s) (incl. Other/custom text as its own class), preceding-context digest (<=2000 chars: last user message + active file/task hints), session id, account/root, repo/project, timestamp.

DEDUP: by session id + tool_use id (mirrors may contain pool sessions duplicated).

OUTPUTS:
- /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/decisions.jsonl (one JSON object per clean decision)
- stats summary: counts by root, header, option-count, multiSelect share, pick-position distribution

SUCCESS CRITERION (pre-registered): >=500 clean decisions extracted AND a baseline table with accuracy/ECE/Brier produced (baseline = trivial predictor, e.g. always-first-option or majority-class, evaluated against picked option).

CONSTRAINTS: repo code read-only via cc-steer-exp1 jj workspace (uv run --no-sync only); no writes to live ~/.cc-steer data; no jj/git mutations; no LLM calls this stage (mechanical extraction only); ccx for any code reading.

No LLM spend this stage.
